SEARCH
Package org.teavm.jso.dom.html

Interface HTMLElement

All Superinterfaces:
Element, JSObject
public interface HTMLElement extends Element
Mock for org.teavm.jso.dom.html.HTMLElement.

In the real TeaVM runtime, this interface represents an HTML element in the DOM. Here it serves only as a compilation stub. Methods inherited from Element (setAttribute, appendChild, setTextContent) are available.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface org.teavm.jso.dom.xml.Element

    appendChild, setAttribute, setTextContent
